summary: The diff implements the three requirements (REQ-34, REQ-35, REQ-36) substantially. A PortalSelectionPage at /portal with four role cards is added, four role-specific login pages via RoleLoginPage component are created, routes are registered in App.tsx, the ProfileSetupModal is updated with a defaultRole prop and role-locking behavior, Layout.tsx passes the defaultRole to the modal, and the Navigation/Footer/HomePage are updated to route unauthenticated users to /login/{role}. However, some acceptance criteria for REQ-35 are only partially evidenced due to truncation.

missing_requirements.requirement: After profile setup is completed from a role-specific login page, the user is redirected to the correct role dashboard.
missing_requirements.reason: The ProfileSetupModal has an onComplete callback and Layout.tsx renders it with defaultRole, but the visible diff does not show that onComplete triggers navigation to the role's dashboard path. The Layout.tsx file does not contain any navigate call in response to profile setup completion.

missing_requirements.requirement: If an authenticated user with an existing mismatched role lands on a role-specific login page, show a message indicating they are already registered under a different role and provide a link to their actual dashboard.
missing_requirements.reason: The RoleLoginPage.tsx is truncated after helper function definitions (getActualDashboardPath, getRoleLabel) and the actual UI rendering of the mismatched-role warning cannot be confirmed as present in the visible diff.
